agent_mode.note: Deterministic curated extraction used. Set ZENMUX_API_KEY for the primary ZenMux extraction pass using x-ai/grok-4.5-free at https://zenmux.ai/api/v1. If ZenMux is unavailable, set OPENROUTER_API_KEY for the fallback OpenRouter pass using tencent/hy3:free at https://openrouter.ai/api/v1. Set COMPOSIO_API_KEY to route fetch/search tools through a Composio-backed adapter.

method: Seeded official-doc corpus from the provided 100-app list
Optional live evidence URL probing via --live-probe
Optional ZenMux-first/OpenRouter-fallback/Composio extraction path documented for credentialed runs

findings.description: Enterprise CRM platform for sales, service, marketing, and custom business data.
findings.main_blocker: OAuth app setup and Salesforce org permissions add setup friction.
findings.evidence_notes: REST API and connected-app OAuth docs are public; developer orgs are self-serve.

findings.description: CRM and marketing automation platform with contacts, companies, tickets, deals, and content APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Rate limits and app scopes need careful packaging.
findings.evidence_notes: Public developer docs describe OAuth and private app access tokens.

findings.description: Sales CRM focused on pipelines, deals, activities, people, and organizations.
findings.main_blocker: Per-user API tokens are easy but OAuth is preferred for marketplace apps.
findings.evidence_notes: Public REST API with OAuth marketplace flow and API token support.

findings.description: Modern CRM with records, objects, lists, notes, and workflow data.
findings.main_blocker: Young API; some workflow actions may be absent.
findings.evidence_notes: Public REST docs describe OAuth and access-token authentication.

findings.description: Open-source CRM with workspace, object, and record APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Self-hosting and instance URL handling must be supported.
findings.evidence_notes: Open-source CRM with public developer docs and repository.

findings.description: Citrix collaboration and CRM-style workspace app with items, apps, tasks, and files.
findings.main_blocker: Legacy API patterns and OAuth flow need careful refresh handling.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer site documents REST endpoints and OAuth authentication.

findings.description: CRM suite for leads, contacts, accounts, deals, activities, and modules.
findings.main_blocker: Regional data centers and Zoho account scopes add integration complexity.
findings.evidence_notes: Public v7 CRM API docs and OAuth overview are available.

findings.description: Sales CRM for leads, contacts, calls, email, tasks, and opportunities.
findings.main_blocker: Basic auth with API key is straightforward; account access still needs a Close workspace.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs describe API-key authentication over HTTP Basic and REST resources.

findings.description: Google Workspace-focused CRM for people, companies, opportunities, and activities.
findings.main_blocker: API access usually requires a paid/admin-managed Copper account.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs expose REST API and API key authentication.

findings.description: Deal management CRM for investment banking and private capital workflows.
findings.main_blocker: Access is oriented to DealCloud customers and configured environments.
findings.evidence_notes: API docs exist, but credentials depend on customer environment and vendor setup.

findings.description: Customer support platform for tickets, users, help center, messaging, and automations.
findings.main_blocker: Broad surface; packaging scopes and rate limits matter.
findings.evidence_notes: Public API reference covers token, basic, and OAuth options.

findings.description: Customer messaging and support platform for conversations, contacts, tickets, and articles.
findings.main_blocker: OAuth app review may be needed for marketplace distribution.
findings.evidence_notes: Public REST API and authentication docs describe access tokens and OAuth.

findings.description: Helpdesk product for tickets, contacts, companies, agents, and knowledge base.
findings.main_blocker: API key auth is easy; product has plan-specific feature limits.
findings.evidence_notes: Public REST API docs use API key over Basic auth.

findings.description: Shared inbox and customer operations platform for messages, contacts, channels, and rules.
findings.main_blocker: OAuth app approval may matter for public distribution.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs describe REST API, OAuth, and token authentication.

findings.description: B2B support platform for Slack, Microsoft Teams, email, issues, and customer data.
findings.main_blocker: Docs are public but product access is newer and customer-centric.
findings.evidence_notes: Public docs expose developer API references and webhooks.

findings.description: Helpdesk and live-chat suite for tickets, contacts, chats, calls, and knowledge base.
findings.main_blocker: Older docs; endpoint coverage is usable but less modern.
findings.evidence_notes: Support docs document API usage and keys.

findings.description: Modern support platform for customers, issues, conversations, and events.
findings.main_blocker: GraphQL schema design requires typed tool wrappers.
findings.evidence_notes: Plain exposes a public GraphQL API with API key authentication.

findings.description: Customer support platform for mailboxes, conversations, customers, docs, and reports.
findings.main_blocker: OAuth token lifecycle and mailbox scoping need care.
findings.evidence_notes: Mailbox API docs document OAuth2 and broad REST resources.

findings.description: Ecommerce helpdesk for tickets, customers, macros, orders, and integrations.
findings.main_blocker: API access is useful but tied to merchant/admin accounts and plan features.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs cover REST API authentication and app integrations.

findings.description: Customer service platform for people-centered conversations and tasks.
findings.main_blocker: API docs and credentials are customer/partner oriented.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer portal exists but access is aimed at Gladly customers and partners.

findings.description: Team messaging platform with channels, messages, users, workflows, and apps.
findings.main_blocker: Granular Slack scopes require careful tool design.
findings.evidence_notes: Public platform docs cover OAuth and token-based Slack apps.

findings.description: Communications API platform for SMS, voice, video, email, verification, and messaging.
findings.main_blocker: Some products require compliance registration before production use.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs cover REST APIs, account credentials, API keys, and webhooks.

findings.description: Team chat and collaboration app in the Zoho suite.
findings.main_blocker: Zoho account, region, and scope setup add friction.
findings.evidence_notes: Zoho Cliq REST API and OAuth docs are public.

findings.description: Collaboration suite with messaging, docs, calendar, approval, and workplace APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Tenant app permissions and regional Open Platform differences add complexity.
findings.evidence_notes: Open Platform docs expose broad APIs and token flows.

findings.description: Team messaging app from CAKE.com for channels, messages, users, and webhooks.
findings.main_blocker: API appears narrower than Slack-style platforms.
findings.evidence_notes: Help docs describe API and webhook access.

findings.description: Community chat platform with bots, guilds, channels, messages, and interactions.
findings.main_blocker: Bot permissions and privileged intents must be configured explicitly.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs cover REST, Gateway, OAuth2, bot tokens, and webhooks.

findings.description: Messaging platform with Bot API, MTProto client API, and webhooks.
findings.main_blocker: Bot API is easy; full user-client API is a different auth model.
findings.evidence_notes: Official docs cover Bot API tokens and MTProto API.

findings.description: Meta messaging platform for WhatsApp business messaging and templates.
findings.main_blocker: Business verification, phone setup, and template review are the blockers.
findings.evidence_notes: Cloud API docs are public but production use requires Meta business setup.

findings.description: Cloud phone system for calls, contacts, users, numbers, and analytics.
findings.main_blocker: Telephony use cases depend on account plan and phone-number setup.
findings.evidence_notes: Aircall developer docs cover REST APIs and authentication.

findings.description: Communications APIs for voice, SMS, video, verify, and messaging.
findings.main_blocker: Product-specific auth modes and compliance steps need clear tool grouping.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs describe broad APIs and multiple auth models.

findings.description: Google advertising API for campaigns, accounts, reporting, bidding, and assets.
findings.main_blocker: Requires developer token review and OAuth consent/project setup.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs are public, but production developer token approval is required.

findings.description: Meta Marketing API for ad accounts, campaigns, audiences, creatives, and insights.
findings.main_blocker: App review, business verification, and permissions are major blockers.
findings.evidence_notes: Marketing API uses Graph API access tokens and reviewed permissions.

findings.description: LinkedIn Marketing APIs for campaigns, ad accounts, creatives, and reporting.
findings.main_blocker: Marketing API access is gated by LinkedIn developer products and approval.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs are public but product access commonly requires approval.

findings.description: Agency CRM and marketing platform with locations, contacts, calendars, workflows, and SaaS APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Versioned APIs and agency/location scoping need careful modeling.
findings.evidence_notes: Stoplight docs expose REST APIs and OAuth 2.0.

findings.description: Email marketing platform for audiences, campaigns, automations, ecommerce, and reports.
findings.main_blocker: Data-center-specific API base URLs must be derived from credentials.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs cover Marketing API, API keys, and OAuth2.

findings.description: Marketing automation and customer data platform for profiles, events, lists, flows, and campaigns.
findings.main_blocker: Revisioned API versions and scopes need explicit handling.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs cover REST API and private key/OAuth authentication.

findings.description: Funnel, email, course, and affiliate platform for small businesses.
findings.main_blocker: API appears narrower and plan/account gated.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs expose API reference and API key help content.

findings.description: Visual discovery and ads platform with pins, boards, catalogs, and ads APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Ads and shopping surfaces may require business account approval.
findings.evidence_notes: Pinterest API v5 docs and OAuth authentication are public.

findings.description: Meta social platform API for publishing, replies, insights, and media containers.
findings.main_blocker: App review and permissions govern production publishing/insights use.
findings.evidence_notes: Threads API docs use Meta developer app and OAuth permissions.

findings.description: Email delivery platform for sending mail, templates, contacts, and stats.
findings.main_blocker: Sender authentication and compliance are separate production tasks.
findings.evidence_notes: SendGrid API docs describe API key authentication and REST endpoints.

findings.description: Commerce platform with store, product, order, customer, fulfillment, and app APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Shopify has many surfaces; Admin GraphQL should be the primary tool layer.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs cover Admin APIs, OAuth, access tokens, and app auth.

findings.description: WordPress ecommerce plugin with products, orders, customers, coupons, and reports APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Self-hosted WordPress URL and plugin configuration vary per store.
findings.evidence_notes: REST API docs cover consumer key/secret authentication.

findings.description: SaaS ecommerce platform with catalog, carts, orders, customers, and storefront APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Store hash and channel context must be modeled cleanly.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs cover REST, GraphQL, OAuth, and access tokens.

findings.description: Enterprise commerce platform with OCAPI, SCAPI, shopper, and admin APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Requires Commerce Cloud tenant/sandbox and admin configuration.
findings.evidence_notes: Commerce API docs are public; tenant credentials are customer/admin controlled.

findings.description: Adobe Commerce platform with catalog, customer, cart, order, and admin APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Self-hosted vs Adobe Commerce Cloud deployments differ.
findings.evidence_notes: Adobe docs cover REST, GraphQL, and token-based auth.

findings.description: Website and commerce platform with orders, products, inventory, profiles, and transactions APIs.
findings.main_blocker: APIs cover commerce and profiles but not every website editing function.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs cover API keys, OAuth apps, and commerce resources.

findings.description: Ecommerce platform with store, product, order, customer, and app APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Store ID and app token scopes need careful handling.
findings.evidence_notes: API docs cover REST endpoints and authentication.

findings.description: Creator commerce platform with products, sales, subscribers, and license APIs.
findings.main_blocker: API is useful but narrower than full store platforms.
findings.evidence_notes: Gumroad documents API access and OAuth applications.

findings.description: Amazon marketplace API for listings, orders, inventory, reports, feeds, and finances.
findings.main_blocker: Developer profile, app review, LWA, IAM, and restricted data approval are heavy blockers.
findings.evidence_notes: SP-API docs are public but app registration and approval are substantial.

findings.description: Creator monetization and fan engagement platform.
findings.main_blocker: No obvious public developer API documentation found from the provided hint.
findings.evidence_notes: Public site is product-facing; API credentials were not discoverable in this pass.

findings.description: SEO and marketing data API provider for SERP, keyword, backlinks, and on-page data.
findings.main_blocker: Paid credits are needed for meaningful production volume.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs expose REST APIs and login/password API authentication.

findings.description: SEO platform with keyword, ranking, backlink, site audit, and report APIs.
findings.main_blocker: API access depends on SE Ranking account and plan limits.
findings.evidence_notes: API docs and API access are public, with plan/account constraints.

findings.description: SEO data platform for backlinks, keywords, site explorer, and rank data.
findings.main_blocker: API access is paid and quota-limited.
findings.evidence_notes: Ahrefs API docs cover token auth and SEO data endpoints.

findings.description: Web scraping API/service for extracting pages and structured data.
findings.main_blocker: Scraping success depends on target-site policy and anti-bot limits.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs expose API reference and key-based access.

findings.description: Actor-based scraping and automation platform with datasets, runs, storage, and marketplace actors.
findings.main_blocker: Best toolkit design should wrap Actors and datasets rather than raw endpoints only.
findings.evidence_notes: Apify documents REST API, SDKs, and an MCP integration.

findings.description: Web crawling and extraction API for LLM-ready search, scrape, crawl, and map tasks.
findings.main_blocker: Usage is credit-based; long crawls need async handling.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs cover API keys, REST/SDK use, and MCP server setup.

findings.description: Proxy, scraping, SERP, and web-data platform for large-scale data collection.
findings.main_blocker: Powerful but account/payment setup and compliance policy need review.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs cover APIs and MCP server; production use is account and billing gated.

findings.description: Open-source OSINT tool for checking usernames across social networks.
findings.main_blocker: It is a CLI/open-source tool, not a hosted authenticated SaaS API.
findings.evidence_notes: Repository documents CLI usage; toolkit would wrap the CLI rather than an API.

findings.description: Company/contact enrichment platform for go-to-market data workflows.
findings.main_blocker: API access appears sales/customer gated.
findings.evidence_notes: Product/docs presence suggests API, but credentials are not openly self-serve.

findings.description: Data enrichment and GTM workflow platform for tables, enrichments, and automations.
findings.main_blocker: API access is workspace/plan gated and not as open as developer-first tools.
findings.evidence_notes: Clay docs describe HTTP API access for workspace workflows.

findings.description: Developer platform for repositories, issues, pull requests, actions, users, and orgs.
findings.main_blocker: Mature APIs; main work is permission-safe tool design.
findings.evidence_notes: GitHub documents REST/GraphQL APIs and maintains an MCP server.

findings.description: Frontend cloud platform for deployments, projects, teams, domains, and env vars.
findings.main_blocker: Team/project scoping and deployment side effects need guardrails.
findings.evidence_notes: Vercel REST API docs cover bearer token authentication.

findings.description: Web hosting and app platform for sites, deploys, forms, functions, and domains.
findings.main_blocker: Some admin actions require team privileges.
findings.evidence_notes: Netlify documents REST/OpenAPI access and OAuth/token auth.

findings.description: Internet infrastructure platform for DNS, CDN, Workers, storage, security, and accounts.
findings.main_blocker: Huge surface requires scoped tool packs and safety checks.
findings.evidence_notes: Cloudflare has public API docs and official MCP-related documentation.

findings.description: Open-source backend platform with Postgres, auth, storage, realtime, edge functions, and management APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Distinguish project data APIs from management APIs and service-role secrets.
findings.evidence_notes: Supabase docs cover APIs and MCP integration.

findings.description: Graph database platform with Cypher, HTTP APIs, drivers, Aura, and graph data science.
findings.main_blocker: Database credentials and Cypher safety boundaries are the key issue.
findings.evidence_notes: Neo4j exposes HTTP APIs, drivers, and Aura APIs.

findings.description: Cloud data platform for SQL warehouses, data sharing, apps, and account APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Requires account/admin setup and careful data-access controls.
findings.evidence_notes: Snowflake SQL API docs cover OAuth, key-pair JWT, PAT, and password auth.

findings.description: Managed MongoDB platform with project, cluster, database user, backup, and monitoring APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Organization/project permissions and destructive operations require guardrails.
findings.evidence_notes: Atlas Admin API docs and API key setup are public.

findings.description: Observability platform for metrics, logs, traces, monitors, dashboards, and incidents.
findings.main_blocker: High-volume data APIs and write actions need rate and permission controls.
findings.evidence_notes: Datadog API reference and key docs are public.

findings.description: Error monitoring platform for issues, events, releases, orgs, projects, and alerts.
findings.main_blocker: Organization/project permissions and noisy event data should be scoped.
findings.evidence_notes: Sentry API docs cover auth tokens and integration OAuth flows.

findings.description: Workspace platform for pages, databases, comments, users, and blocks.
findings.main_blocker: Page/database permission sharing is the main source of empty results.
findings.evidence_notes: Notion developer docs cover auth and MCP documentation.

findings.description: No-code database platform with bases, tables, records, comments, webhooks, and metadata APIs.
findings.main_blocker: Base/table schema discovery is needed before record operations.
findings.evidence_notes: Airtable Web API docs cover PAT and OAuth authentication.

findings.description: Issue tracking and product planning platform for issues, projects, cycles, teams, and comments.
findings.main_blocker: GraphQL schema is rich; tools should be task-oriented rather than exposing raw queries.
findings.evidence_notes: Linear docs cover GraphQL API, API keys, OAuth, and webhooks.

findings.description: Atlassian project management platform for issues, projects, boards, sprints, users, and workflows.
findings.main_blocker: Cloud vs Data Center differences and permissions must be handled.
findings.evidence_notes: Atlassian docs cover Jira REST API and OAuth/API-token auth.

findings.description: Work management platform for tasks, projects, portfolios, goals, users, and teams.
findings.main_blocker: Workspace/project scoping and custom fields need discovery helpers.
findings.evidence_notes: Asana docs cover OAuth, PATs, REST API, and webhooks.

findings.description: Work OS for boards, items, columns, automations, docs, and dashboards.
findings.main_blocker: GraphQL complexity and board schema discovery are the main design work.
findings.evidence_notes: Developer docs cover GraphQL API and auth tokens/OAuth.

findings.description: Productivity platform for tasks, lists, spaces, docs, goals, and time tracking.
findings.main_blocker: Hierarchy discovery is required before acting on tasks/lists.
findings.evidence_notes: ClickUp API docs cover REST endpoints and OAuth/token auth.

findings.description: Collaborative docs platform with docs, tables, rows, pages, packs, and formulas.
findings.main_blocker: Doc/table schema discovery needed for robust row tools.
findings.evidence_notes: Coda API docs cover bearer-token authentication and REST resources.

findings.description: Work management platform for sheets, rows, reports, workspaces, attachments, and automation.
findings.main_blocker: Enterprise admin controls may restrict access.
findings.evidence_notes: Smartsheet API docs cover OAuth and token authentication.

findings.description: Time tracking and invoicing platform for time entries, projects, clients, users, and invoices.
findings.main_blocker: Account ID header and user permissions must be modeled.
findings.evidence_notes: Harvest API v2 docs cover OAuth2 and personal access tokens.

findings.description: Payments platform for charges, customers, subscriptions, invoices, payouts, and financial objects.
findings.main_blocker: Money-moving actions require strong confirmation and idempotency guardrails.
findings.evidence_notes: Stripe docs cover APIs and an agent toolkit/MCP path.

findings.description: Financial data API for bank account linking, transactions, identity, auth, and payments.
findings.main_blocker: Production access requires compliance review and institution products vary.
findings.evidence_notes: Plaid docs expose REST APIs and token-based Link/item flows.

findings.description: Crypto exchange APIs for market data, spot trading, account, wallet, and WebSocket streams.
findings.main_blocker: Trading tools require high-risk safety controls and regional account constraints.
findings.evidence_notes: Binance docs cover REST/WebSocket APIs and signed API-key requests.

findings.description: Payment processing connector associated with NMI-powered payment workflows.
findings.main_blocker: Public developer documentation was limited; credentials appear merchant/partner gated.
findings.evidence_notes: Finding relies on vendor/product context; direct self-serve docs were not found.

findings.description: AI/payment or fintech API product with public docs referenced by the prompt.
findings.main_blocker: Docs availability and commercial access need human confirmation.
findings.evidence_notes: Hinted docs could not be confidently classified from public evidence alone.

findings.description: Intuit accounting platform for customers, invoices, bills, payments, reports, and accounting data.
findings.main_blocker: Sandbox is easy; production apps need Intuit review for some scopes.
findings.evidence_notes: Intuit docs cover QuickBooks APIs and OAuth2.

findings.description: Accounting platform for invoices, contacts, payments, bank transactions, payroll, and reports.
findings.main_blocker: Tenant selection and accounting write safety need careful UX.
findings.evidence_notes: Xero developer docs cover accounting APIs and OAuth2.

findings.description: Corporate card and spend management platform for expenses, cards, vendors, and transactions.
findings.main_blocker: Access requires Brex customer/admin context and scopes.
findings.evidence_notes: Brex docs cover API authentication and endpoints.

findings.description: Corporate card and spend management platform for expenses, cards, reimbursements, and vendors.
findings.main_blocker: API access is workspace/admin and often enterprise-controlled.
findings.evidence_notes: Ramp docs expose APIs and authentication, but credentials require customer access.

findings.description: Private market and company intelligence platform with research data APIs.
findings.main_blocker: API is commercial research-data access and not openly self-serve.
findings.evidence_notes: PitchBook positions API as a commercial data product requiring engagement.

findings.description: Google AI note/research product; enterprise API path is via Gemini/Vertex AI rather than consumer NotebookLM.
findings.main_blocker: No clear public NotebookLM consumer API; build against Gemini/Vertex AI instead.
findings.evidence_notes: Public APIs exist for Gemini/Vertex AI, not a direct NotebookLM app API.

findings.description: Meeting transcription and notes product with imports, transcripts, and automation features.
findings.main_blocker: MCP exists but workspace/product access and API breadth are limited.
findings.evidence_notes: Otter help documents an MCP server; broader API access is less open.

findings.description: AI meeting recorder and summary platform for calls, transcripts, clips, and CRM sync.
findings.main_blocker: No clear public API docs from the product site; likely needs partner/customer access.
findings.evidence_notes: Public docs emphasize product usage; API access was not clearly self-serve.

findings.description: AI research search engine for scientific papers and evidence synthesis.
findings.main_blocker: API/OAuth access appears requested rather than broadly documented.
findings.evidence_notes: API access appears to require request/contact rather than public self-serve docs.

findings.description: Document parsing API for extracting structured data from PDFs and business documents.
findings.main_blocker: Document upload workflows need privacy and file-size handling.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs cover API-key auth, parsing endpoints, and SDK use.

findings.description: AI software engineering agent platform with API/MCP integration surfaces.
findings.main_blocker: Access depends on Devin account/workspace and product availability.
findings.evidence_notes: Docs describe Devin integration and MCP surfaces.

findings.description: AI content creation suite with CLI-oriented tooling.
findings.main_blocker: Public API/tooling surface is not clearly documented enough for a stable toolkit.
findings.evidence_notes: CLI hint exists, but auth/API breadth remained unclear in this pass.

findings.description: Open-source CLI for rendering Mermaid diagrams to images/PDF/SVG.
findings.main_blocker: No SaaS auth; toolkit should wrap local CLI execution and file outputs.
findings.evidence_notes: Open-source CLI repository documents local rendering usage.

findings.description: Transcript API service for retrieving YouTube video transcripts.
findings.main_blocker: Narrow API; rate limits and transcript availability are the main caveats.
findings.evidence_notes: Public docs expose key-based transcript API.

findings.description: AI meeting recording, notes, clips, and conversation intelligence platform.
findings.main_blocker: API access appears tied to workspace/admin setup rather than open signup alone.
findings.evidence_notes: Grain API/product docs indicate meeting-data integration surfaces.
